findings.location: s1 — 登録完了画面の表示確認 step
findings.description: The source includes a note at the JSP display confirmation step: 「ただし、この時点では更新処理を実装していない為、DBの更新は行われていない。」 This constraint — that DB updates are NOT performed when verifying the complete screen display — is absent from the knowledge file. It clarifies the incremental implementation order and is relevant context for an AI answering questions about this step.
findings.source_evidence: 2) 登録完了画面の表示確認 — 「ただし、この時点では更新処理を実装していない為、DBの更新は行われていない。」

findings.description: The SQL INSERT statement in s2 references columns `UPDATED_USER_ID` and `UPDATED_DATE`, but these column names are absent from the s2 hints array. `INSERT_USER_ID` and `INSERT_DATE` are present, creating an inconsistent set.
findings.source_evidence: SQL in ①ユーザテーブル登録用のSQL文の追加: `UPDATED_USER_ID`, `UPDATED_DATE` appear as column names and bind variables `:updatedUserId`, `:updatedDate`

findings.description: The SQL file name `W11AC01Action` (from `W11AC01Action.sql`) follows PascalCase and is explicitly referenced in the source as the file where `REGISTER_USERS` SQL is stored. It is missing from s2 hints despite being content-level navigation information.
findings.source_evidence: ①ユーザテーブル登録用のSQL文の追加 table: SQLファイル名 = `W11AC01Action.sql`
